feedback.text: I believe that payment processors must not have a say on the content being sold by their partners, because they recently introduced a rule in videogame stores that the games must be in agreement with their own rules, which can introduce heavy censorship and highlight a monopoly in their category. Videogames treating hard topics are now the target even if the goal is to denounce such topics. In addition to that, I also agree with all my fellow citizen about video games being destroyed. You can search "dead game list" on stopkillinggames [dot] wiki [dot] gg for a list of games that are at risk, dead, or preserved.
